Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xCB00 "SIRENCITY-CB00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Siren City.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game has a BASIC title screen which uses a SYS command to start the machine code main program when a key is pressed. Therefore, a belt-and-braces BASIC init routine has been added at $CB00 which initalises all key BASIC values and pointers before calling the RUN command.
